acted.description: true only if you changed files to propose one improvement; false if you chose to do nothing this run.

action_type.description: Which of the charter's options you took (none if acted is false).

pr_title.description: Short, specific PR title. Empty string if acted is false.

pr_body.description: Full PR description in Markdown with the three GARDENER.md sections: '## What & why', '## Provenance', '## Self-check'. Empty string if acted is false.

summary.description: One or two sentences for the run log. If acted is false, explain why nothing cleared the bar.
